_comment: The .md roots your twin reads, retrieved semantically per query. Ships EMPTY: add one entry per folder of notes you want indexed. Paths are per-host; '~' expands to your home directory. Example root: { "label": "notes", "path": "~/notes", "glob": "**/*.md" }. The persona core (src/persona/me.md) is always loaded regardless of this file. Edit your own copy in ~/.me.md/corpus.config.json, not the package.
